_note: Orionfold Cortex (slug orionfold-cortex; renamed from local-knowledge-appliance) IS the Arena M10 recall layer (fieldkit.memory + the /arena/knowledge pane), shipped 2026-06-02 in commit ebe6425. This launch documents the session that DROVE it end-to-end on the repo's own corpus, measured its recall, and fixed a bug. The agentic-effort numbers (sessions/turns/tokens/wall-clock) are that launch session; lines_of_code + test_cases describe Cortex's recall-layer code surface (authored at M10), credited as substrate in the prose.

build_window.label: one launch session (~4 hours) driving + measuring the Arena M10 recall layer

loc._scope: the appliance's recall-layer code surface (Arena M10, 2026-06-02)

tests._scope: fieldkit/tests/test_memory.py (the module's own suite); this session also added 2 regression tests for the rag_eval json fix
